title: Cross-Product Alignment Meeting - 2027-08-12
body:
Attendees
- Alice Chen
- Bob Martinez
- Diana Wu

Background
The meeting was called to discuss cross-product alignment progress and upcoming milestones. The teams reviewed the current state of the Q3 roadmap and identified areas where product efforts are diverging. Key deadlines and resource constraints were flagged by each representative.

Decisions
1. Align on Q3 roadmap priorities – all teams agreed to prioritize the shared API unification work and the customer-facing dashboard refresh over isolated feature development.
2. Combine release cycles – the group decided to merge the two remaining Q3 release windows into a single coordinated go-live date of 2027-09-30 to reduce integration risk and improve cross-product testing.

Action Items
- Alice to update product roadmap timeline in JIRA to reflect the new unified release date and the agreed priority stack.
- Bob to schedule follow-up with engineering leads to hammer out the detailed integration schedule and resource plan.
- Diana to draft integration spec by 2027-08-20, covering cross-product API alignment and data contract updates.

Freeform Discussion
Alice raised the concern that marketing may need earlier visibility into the combined launch. Diana suggested we preview the spec at the architecture review next Thursday. Bob agreed to include that checkpoint in the follow-up. The team briefly touched on the budget freeze rumor but decided to defer that until the next sync. General consensus was that communication between product units has improved noticeably since the last alignment cycle. No further action items were deemed critical at this time.
